title: Better Pets
description: Customize your Minecraft experience with new pets, offering unique abilities and companionship during your adventures.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/163b0ed57c5aa08e413d6c99338a0f4854336187.png)

## 📖 Description Experience the ultimate companionship in Minecraft with pets at your side that you can find by exploring new areas. Each pet is unique in its own way and can help you in certain situations with their perks and abilities. Gather more pets to get all the perks or just let them exist by your side and be your companion forever.

Explore the seamless functionality in both single-player and multiplayer modes.

Better Pets v3+ does not have multiplayer support.
Better Pets v4.0.1+ does have multiplayer support.
Better Pets v4.2.0 does not have multiplayer support.
Better Pets v4.2.4+ does have multiplayer support.
## ⭐ Features • Pets that can be found in buried treasure chests and shipwreck treasure.
• Pets that follow you when activated.
• Pets can be leveled when the player gains exp.
• Pets that give their owner abilities that get stronger, the higher level they are.
• Works in all dimensions.
• In-game wiki for easy information gathering about certain pets.
• 99.9% Multiplayer supported. Better Pets is heavily inspired by Hypixel Skyblock. ## Preview ## 🛠️ How to obtain Find Pets in Buried Treasure or Sunken Treasure
Pet Menu Item Recipe for v4.2.2+ only.
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d7910af9a0c4ddc5e09b1d4f346595401effb95.png)
